title: Avandha Fort
tagline: Avandha Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Avandha Fort, or Avandha Killa (Marathi: औंढ़ा/ अवंढा किल्ला), is a fort situated in Aundhewadi village between Nasik and Ahmadnagar in Maharashtra.
overview.description: Avandha Fort, or Avandha Killa (Marathi: औंढ़ा/ अवंढा किल्ला), is a fort situated in Aundhewadi village between Nasik and Ahmadnagar in Maharashtra. This fort is close to Patta Fort. The residents of Patta Killa are known as Pattekar, meaning "residents of Fort Patta".

topPlaces.name: Kadwa Dam
topPlaces.description: Kadwa Dam, is an earthfill dam on Kadwa river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Bharvir Khurd
topPlaces.description: Bharvir Khurd is a village of Igatpuri Taluka in Nashik District in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is located near the Kadwa Reservoir.

topPlaces.name: Pandhurli
topPlaces.description: Pandhurli is a village and a municipal council in Sinnar taluka of Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Lake Beale
topPlaces.description: Lake Beale is a lake located in Nashik District, in Maharashtra, India. The estimate terrain elevation above sea level is 547 metres.

items.note: Kadwa Dam, is an earthfill dam on Kadwa river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in state of Maharashtra in India.
Bharvir Khurd is a village of Igatpuri Taluka in Nashik District in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is located near the Kadwa Reservoir.
Pandhurli is a village and a municipal council in Sinnar taluka of Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Lake Beale is a lake located in Nashik District, in Maharashtra, India. The estimate terrain elevation above sea level is 547 metres.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Avandha Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Avandha Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Avandha Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (23 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Avandha Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Avandha Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Avandha Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Avandha Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Avandha Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kadwa Dam, Bharvir Khurd, Pandhurli, Lake Beale.
